category_title: Adolescents and adults with moderate to severe ID who use speech and key word signing
minimal_context: The student is participating in a midday mealtime group activity and requesting food items.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for our midday meal. What would you like to drink?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Here is your juice. What are you going to eat?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Sandwich. (Picks up the sandwich with both hands)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Do you want some fruit with your sandwich?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Yes, apple. (Communicates exclusively verbally, abandoning spontaneous manual signs entirely while holding the food)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for our midday meal. What would you like to drink?

STUDENT: Juice.

TUTOR: Here is your juice. What are you going to eat?

STUDENT: Sandwich. (Picks up the sandwich with both hands)

TUTOR: Do you want some fruit with your sandwich?

STUDENT: Yes, apple. (Communicates exclusively verbally, abandoning spontaneous manual signs entirely while holding the food)
